title: cyrtanthus sanguineus subsp. minor
intro: Cyrtanthus sanguineus subsp. minor, also known as the Red Hot Poker, is a plant species belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can help soothe and treat various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a valuable remedy in traditional herbal medicine. Cyrtanthus sanguineus subsp. minor can be prepared as an infusion or decoction to make a tea, and it can also be used to make a tincture or added to creams and ointments for topical application.
